title: BITS Pilani – Research Assistant – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has recruits 1 Research Assistant Post. Candidates with Postgraduate in Social Science with NET/M.Phil/Ph.D can apply through email. The application process closes on 31-05-2026. Candidates should apply through the BITS Pilani website, bits-pilani.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks and NET/M.Phil/Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
